conferences.title: Unifying Adult and Pediatric Domains: Multi-Dataset Deep Learning for Fracture Classification, Detection, and Segmentation
conferences.description: Unified training pipeline harmonizing FracAtlas (adult) and GRAZPEDWRI-DX (pediatric) datasets. Achieved gains in Classification AUC (+3.8%), Detection mAP (+4.2%), and Segmentation Dice (+2.7%).

conferences.title: BanglaSign-Tutor: An Interactive Bangla Sign Language Learning System via Finger-Guided Feedback
conferences.description: Combined Computer Vision with LLM (Gemma 3) pipeline for BDSL hand-sign recognition. 98.2% alphabet accuracy, 99.5% numeral accuracy. 56.43% reduction in learning latency.

conferences.title: Urban Sustainability in Bangladesh: Satellite-Based Analysis of Land Use and Air Pollution Trends
conferences.description: Google Earth Engine analysis of LULC and pollution trends (2019–2025). Comparative evaluation of six ML algorithms including Random Forest and XGBoost.

ongoing.title: Prompt Injection is an Authorization Problem: Cryptographic Provenance for Secure Agentic Workflows
ongoing.description: Security framework for LLM agents using cryptographic context validation to prevent prompt injection and ensure workflow integrity.

ongoing.title: COAST: Clinical Oncology Architecture for Survival Translation with Reliable Prediction
ongoing.description: System architecture for clinically deployable survival prediction integrating deep learning features with clinical data using Cox Proportional Hazards.
